root.sql:
SELECT pka_mem_newmem.fp_member_name(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.academic_salary, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.remuneration_amount, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_app_work_info.working_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as working_date, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_id, sc_mem_m_app_share.share_monthly, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no, sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as apply_date_tdate, TRUNC( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth,sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date)/12 ) as age, sc_mem_m_application_form.sex, sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id)as format_hum_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_name, sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description from sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position where sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position = sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position ) as group_pos_name --,(select sum(insurance_approve) --from sc_mem_m_app_member_insurance --where sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_member_insurance.application_form_no ) insurance_approve --, NVL(sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long,'ไม่ระบุ') AS position_name , (select sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_position where sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long)as position_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_name , sc_mem_m_app_work_info.level_code , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_application_form.entry_id , (select max(trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) in (select (sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id) from sc_mem_m_application_form where sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status = '2')) as hum_id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card
,trim((select address_no from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')||' '|| decode((select mooban from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,'มบ'||(select mooban from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) ||' '|| decode((select moo from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,'ม.'||(select moo from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) ||' '|| decode((select soi from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,'ซ.'||(select soi from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) ||' '|| decode((select road from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,'ถ.'||(select road from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) ||' '|| decode((select tambol from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,decode((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'), '010' , 'แขวง'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ((select tambol from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) , 'ต.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name ((select tambol from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')))) ||' '|| decode((select district_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'), null , null ,decode((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , '010' , 'เขต'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'),(select district_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')) , 'อ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'),(select district_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')))||' '|| decode((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'), null , null ,'จ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name((select province_code from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0'))) ||' '|| (select postcode from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')||' '|| decode((select telephone from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') , null , null ,'โทร.'||(select telephone from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0') ))) as member_address ,(select telephone from sc_mem_m_app_address where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and address_type = '0')as telephone
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code) as districtgroup ,sc_mem_m_app_bank_accno.bank_id ,sc_mem_m_app_bank_accno.bank_acc_no ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.short_name ,sc_mem_m_application_form.remark ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_application_form.retire_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as retire_date FROM sc_mem_m_application_form, sc_mem_m_app_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_app_share, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr ,sc_mem_m_app_bank_accno ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.application_form_no(+) ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no(+) = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no )and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_share.application_form_no(+) ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code(+) ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_app_work_info.level_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_code(+)) and (sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no) and sc_mem_m_app_bank_accno.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_app_bank_accno.bank_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no asc
